strengths: 15+ years across full-stack web, mobile, and embedded — well beyond the 6+ year bar
Current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Demonstrated TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker experience at Optilyz and RIDE, plus TDD/CI/CD discipline
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
No Kotlin experience shown; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms at Altom, pre-2018)
Testing skills emphasize Selenium/D-lang tooling; no explicit Vitest, Jest, or Playwright mentions

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin, weak modern JS test framework signal

response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the seniority and fullstack bar with TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB/AWS work at Optilyz and RIDE, and uniquely matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP/agentic-framework work at re:cinq. Engineering rigor is evidenced by TDD/CI/CD at RIDE and a long history of workshops on testing. Gaps are framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js, no Kotlin, no named Vitest/Jest/Playwright usage) but are learnable for an engineer with this breadth, so they reduce rather than block the score.
